title: Chain-D1 positioning unwind: (HYPE,ETH) break + HYPE funding extreme
claim: Correlation break between HYPE and ETH (rho=-0.085, break_score=0.268) is linked via KG path to an extreme long funding rate on HYPE (z=0.00). mechanism: KG path: corr_break тЖТ asset тЖТ has_aggression тЖТ AggressionNode(burst). Flow-driven correlation breaks are self-sustaining: buyers pushing ETH's mark above index create funding pressure that attracts more positioning, keeping the asset decoupled from its pair.

title: Extreme long funding on HYPE predicts reversion
claim: When HYPE funding rate exceeds 2╧Г above rolling mean (direction=long, z=0.00), price reverts toward neutral within 1-2 funding epochs.
mechanism: Excessive long-side funding pressure incentivises short positioning, mechanically compressing the imbalance.

title: Correlation break (HYPE,ETH) тАФ positioning_unwind_candidate
claim: Correlation break between HYPE and ETH (rho=-0.085, break_score=0.268) coincides with a funding extreme; likely a positioning unwind that temporarily decouples the pair.
mechanism: Extreme funding forces holders of the expensive-to-hold leg to unwind, creating one-sided flow that decouples the pair.  Correlation recovers once the imbalance is resolved.
